description: Brain daemon posts to inbox after task completion, failure, validate regression. Adds hex brain watch for streaming. Session-start inbox summary.
feature: Brain Updates to Operator — Push, Don't Poll

phases.description: After each brain task completes or fails, POST to /api/inbox with priority-based notification.
phases.name: Brain posts to inbox after task events

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs daemon tick: after executing each brain task, POST to /api/inbox with priority=1 (completed) or priority=2 (failed). Body: JSON {task_id, kind, payload, status, result_snippet}. Use NexusClient. Swallow errors — don't fail the tick.
tasks.name: Notify on task completion/failure

phases.description: Track last tick's validate result. If new issues appear this tick, notify priority-2.
phases.name: Validate regression detection

tasks.description: In daemon(): maintain a local HashMap<String, usize> of last check's issue counts (cli_wiring=N, mcp_parity=N, etc). Each tick: if any count increased, POST priority-2 notification with the regression details. If counts decreased, log info. Persist last state in a simple struct between ticks (not SpacetimeDB — daemon-local).
tasks.name: Store last validate result, diff per tick

phases.description: Stream brain_tick events via WebSocket or polling.
phases.name: hex brain watch — live stream

tasks.description: Add BrainAction::Watch { since: Option<String> } variant. Implement watch() that polls /api/events?type=brain_tick every 2s (since last event timestamp) and prints new events. Exits on ctrl-C. Simpler than WebSocket for now — can upgrade later.
tasks.name: Add BrainAction::Watch command

phases.description: hex hook session-start shows count of unacked brain notifications.
phases.name: Session-start inbox summary

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs session-start: GET /api/inbox?unacked=true&min_priority=1. If count > 0, print 'Brain: N new notifications — hex inbox list to review'. Show top 3 titles.
tasks.name: Print inbox summary in session-start handler
